case_title: ANNA LUISA CEJA VS. CORRINA PACILLAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2017 - APPEARACE BY BOTH PLINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING, MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506). NO EXHIBIT RETAINED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2017 - CONTINUED CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-28-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANNA CEJA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORRINA PACILLAS IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO CORRINA PACILLAS ON 11/29/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CEJA, ANNA LUISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PACILLAS, CORRINA DEFENDANT'S STATEMENTS IN SUPPORT OF HER APPLICATION FOR A TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF DO NOT CONSTITUTE ACTIONABLE DEFAMATION OF LIBEL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 12/13/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CEJA, ANNA LUISA AS TO DEFENDANT PACILLAS, CORRINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CEJA, ANNA LUISA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 150.00 - SERVED OCT-12-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PACILLAS, CORRINA
